AI Agents & Workflows

Connect people, data, and tools with AI agents that execute repeatable workflows accurately and at scale.

Enterprise AI Agents & Workflow Automation Services

Velar Info builds AI agents and workflow automations that remove repetitive manual work, accelerate approvals, process documents, trigger actions, and connect fragmented systems into one intelligent operating layer.

From finance approvals and HR onboarding to IT support and compliance workflows, our automation solutions combine LLM reasoning, deterministic business rules, API integrations, audit trails, and human review when needed.

70%

Reduction in manual processing time across repeatable workflows

10x

Faster multi-step approvals and document processing

0

Copy-paste errors in automated data handoffs

Autonomous task agents

Strategy, build, integration, and optimization for secure enterprise adoption.

Case studies

Invoice workflow automation

An AI workflow extracted invoice data, matched purchase orders, routed approvals, and logged every step for audit-ready finance operations.

Why us?

Automation that respects business rules

We balance AI flexibility with predictable workflows, permissions, observability, and human checkpoints so automation stays controlled.
